title: ranunculus rotarius
intro: Ranunculus rotarius, also known as the Butcher's Broom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus rotarius include reducing inflammation and improving circulation, as well as providing relief from arthritis, gout, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and health benefits, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
